3267470.name: Purrfect Frenzy
3267470.description:
Step into the paws of a fearless feline in this top-down survival shooter, where a cat is thrust into a deadly rat-run gladiatorial arena. Armed with a variety of guns, you must fight off waves of ruthless rat minions while navigating an ever-changing battlefield. Each stage introduces new challenges as walls rise and obstacles appear, forcing you to adapt quickly to survive.

With intuitive controls and fast-paced action, you'll face off against different types of enemies, all determined to stop you at any cost. Can you survive the relentless gunfire and uncover the sinister secrets lurking behind this brutal arena?

  • Play as a heroic cat fighting for survival in a rat-infested arena.

  • Simple yet responsive controls for quick, fluid gameplay.

  • Face diverse enemy types, each with their own strengths and attack patterns.

  • Dynamic stages that evolve with walls and obstacles after each round.

  • Uncover the hidden mystery behind the rats' cruel gladiatorial contest.
